overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Elden Ring showing a Tarnished character exploring the flooded Academy Gate Town ruins. The character wades through shallow swamp water toward the massive Raya Lucaria Academy castle under a dramatic, stormy red-tinged sky with glowing red embers floating in the air.

scene_state.functional_zone: flooded village ruins with scattered stone cottages

events.description: location text 'Academy Gate Town' fades in and out at screen center
large gnarled oak tree enters view from right, marking shift from built ruins to natural overgrowth

agents.ego_description: Tarnished character wading steadily through shallow swamp water past ruined stone buildings

entered.detail: massive gothic castle with multiple spires floating in the misty background
small dilapidated stone house with broken roof partially submerged in water
collapsed stone bridge structure with archways visible in the distance
green floating vegetation covering patches of the swamp water surface
small floating red light particles drifting through the air

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in the flooded Academy Gate Town with the massive Raya Lucaria Academy castle looming in the misty background. The character wades through shallow water past ruined stone cottages and lily pads while red embers float in the air. A large gnarled oak tree enters the frame from the right, signaling a transition from the built village area toward more overgrown territory.

scene_state.functional_zone: tree-canopied flooded path with tilted ancient ruins

events.description: passing under dense tree canopy significantly darkens the scene and blocks sky visibility
tilted ruin structure with collapsed roof becomes prominent ahead

agents.ego_description: character continues wading forward, navigating around tree trunks and ruined walls while moving deeper into the swamp

entered.detail: massive ancient tree with thick trunk and sprawling branches creating dense canopy overhead
collapsed building with sharply angled roof sinking into the swamp
crumbling stone wall partially covered in moss and vines

segments.scene_description: The character moves under the dense canopy of a massive gnarled oak tree, darkening the scene and creating a sheltered atmosphere. The path winds past tilted ruins and crumbling stone walls while the Raya Lucaria Academy shifts to the left side of the frame. The environment feels more enclosed and overgrown compared to the open village ruins.

scene_state.functional_zone: open swamp with glowing crystal formations and distant golden landmarks

events.description: large glowing teal crystal formations emerge from the water on the left
character passes the glowing crystals and enters more open water with unobstructed castle views

agents.ego_description: character wades past mysterious glowing crystals while approaching the open water area with the castle growing larger in view

entered.detail: tall luminous cyan crystal clusters emerging from the swamp water emitting magical light
massive golden glowing tree visible in the far distance against the mountains
levitating rock formations with vegetation floating in the sky

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the tree cover, the character encounters glowing teal crystal formations rising from the water on the left. The scene opens up dramatically with the Raya Lucaria Academy now centered and appearing closer. In the distance, the massive golden Erdtree becomes visible on the right alongside floating rock islands, creating a sense of approaching a significant landmark.

scene_state.functional_zone: vast open swamp with dramatic storm sky and floating embers

events.description: sky opens up revealing intense red storm clouds and dramatic sunset lighting from the right
distant mountain spires and massive rock formations become visible through the mist

agents.ego_description: character continues wading through deep open water toward the castle with the golden tree glowing brilliantly in the distance

entered.detail: dramatic crimson and purple storm clouds filling the sky with intense color
jagged rocky mountain peaks rising through the mist in the background

segments.scene_description: The final segment opens into a vast expanse of open swamp water under a dramatically lit sky filled with red storm clouds. The Raya Lucaria Academy dominates the left side of the frame while the golden Erdtree glows intensely on the right. The character wades through the deep water toward the distant castle as floating rock islands and mountain spires become visible through the clearing mist, creating an epic, atmospheric conclusion.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey through the flooded ruins of Academy Gate Town, transitioning from a claustrophobic village into a vast, epic landscape dominated by celestial landmarks. It begins with the character wading through shallow water past ruined stone cottages and lily pads, with the massive Raya Lucaria Academy looming through a misty, ember-filled air. As a gnarled oak tree enters the frame, the camera moves beneath its dense canopy, momentarily darkening the scene and enclosing the path among tilted ruins and crumbling walls. The environment then opens up dramatically as the character emerges from the tree cover, passing glowing teal crystal formations while the golden Erdtree and floating rock islands reveal themselves in the distance. Finally, the scene expands into a vast expanse of open swamp water under a stormy red sky, where the character wades toward the towering academy and the intensely glowing Erdtree amidst clearing mist and distant mountain spires.
